entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.4 Demonstrate mastery of systems administration
entries.learning_activity: (a) Maintain computer systems – desktop, laptop, tablets, mobile (create, delete/ disable user account, create, modify, and reset password, user support, peripherals)
teaching_learning_activities: TIPS: Through TIPS guide students to explain the roles of system administrator.
Practical work: Through practical work students to maintain a computer system
entries.assessment: confidently maintain the computer system
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form Four: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.4 Demonstrate mastery of systems administration
entries.learning_activity: (b) Apply troubleshooting tools and techniques
teaching_learning_activities: Demonstration: Through demonstration guide student to apply troubleshooting and maintenance tools
entries.assessment: Clearly identify the roles of system administrator and responsibly troubleshoot a system
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form Four: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.4 Demonstrate mastery of systems administration
entries.learning_activity: (c) Use selected OS to Perform system administration tasks
teaching_learning_activities: Demonstration: Through demonstration guide student to use selected OS to perform system administration duty
entries.assessment: Responsibly administer and maintain a system
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form Four: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 2.5 Demonstrate mastery of basic principles of web development (HTML, CSS, and JavaScript)
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the background of HTML and selected programming languages (CSS, JavaScript)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming or TIPS: Guide student through brainstorming or TIPS to describe the background of HTML and selected programming languages
entries.assessment: Clearly explain the background of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
resources: Computer installed with appropriate programming tools
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form Four: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of data management
entries.specific_competence: 3.2 Demonstrate the mastery of the basic principles of data analysis
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe principles of data analysis (data collection, pre-processing, processing, visualization, interpretation)
teaching_learning_activities: Questions and answer: Through question and answer to guide students to describe principles of data analysis
entries.assessment: Can point out the principles of data analysis
resources: Computer installed with data analysis tools
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form Four: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education
